validation_notes: Heavy build deferred. onnxruntime NOT cloned — needs `bash scripts/clone_all.sh onnxruntime` first. Per-task plan from TASK.md scopes onnx to a later round (the original first-tier was opencv/llama.cpp/whisper.cpp; onnx + pytorch + tensorflow + ollama are second-tier). yaml's inline poc_code (Python protobuf script generating a malicious ONNX with an attribute string lacking null terminator) is sufficient once env is built. HiddenLayer advisory: https://hiddenlayer.com/sai-security-advisory/2024-02-onnx/. No specific upstream fix_commit recorded; would need to find ORT's hardening of the ONNX_ASSERTM helper.
